posts.author: LHo (Leander Hobusch | monday.com ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear all,
I want to establish managed templates for recurring tasks within certain projects. The problem is now while testing this feature, that monday allows everything while generating v1.0 and throws error messages for v1.1 which indicate, that I try to update a template with internal errors (for example contains mirror/link-column to a private board).
I’d like monday to not even let me generate v1.0 rather than not letting me generate v1.1 how about you?
